name: Supervisor Voice
description: Inspect and drive the Supervisor voice playback path through governed XT voice controls, including preview, short speech, and stop.
governed_dispatch_notes: When no action is provided XT defaults to status, or speak if text/content/value is present.
Use action=preview for the built-in preview line, action=speak for short text, and action=stop to interrupt playback.
install_hint: Available immediately as an XT built-in governed skill; pin the official package only if you want it visible in Hub catalog workflows.
